title: justicia polygaloides
intro: Justicia polygaloides, also known as 'Wild Quinine', is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Justicia polygaloides include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for skin and eye infections.
